name: Donna Summer
abstract: Donna Adrian Gaines (December 31, 1948 – May 17, 2012), known professionally as Donna Summer, was an American singer and songwriter. She gained prominence during the disco era of the 1970s and became known as the "Queen of Disco", while her music gained a global following.

concerts.label: An Evening With Donna Summer
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
